creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Victor Kustov from comment #3)

I just built the current nginx port with naxsi on a newly installed FreeBSD 13.2 AMD64, and was able to start nginx afterwards. There was no error.
The problem seems to be in your nginx.conf.

Have you try to report your error here: https://github.com/wargio/naxsi
